gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community highlights and platform updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot updating a giant pixelated billboard or scroll. The bee mascot is watching happily.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head painting new text on a giant wooden signpost, while the cute bee mascot watches happily. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
